notes: 新增：派世x2 carzy light支持
新增：插件市场搜索框

notesEn: Added: Paishi X2 Carzy Light support
Added: plugin marketplace search box
Fixed: Renmo-related issues and other bugs

notes: 新增：仁魔插件、索尼插件、漫步者插件
新增：wallpaper engine两款皮肤：Mechanical skin和sky skin
新增：USB抓包窗口、自定义语音窗口、统一数据api窗口、插件市场窗口，随主体皮肤更新（仅限Fluent和透明皮肤）
修复：插件市场插件状态问题
修复：赛睿、派世识别问题
修复：windows电量仅开启时更新的问题
notesEn: Added: Renmo, Sony, and Edifier plugins
Added: two Wallpaper Engine skins: Mechanical Skin and Sky Skin
Added: USB packet capture, custom voice, unified data API, and plugin marketplace windows updated to match the main app skin (Fluent and Transparent skins only)
Fixed: plugin marketplace plugin status issues
Fixed: SteelSeries and Paishi recognition issues
Fixed: Windows battery only updating when enabled

notes: 新增：派世插件，VGN 98 PRO V3识别
修改：修复迈从休眠无法显示最近电量的问题
修改：黑爵、万灵竞记识别相关的问题
修复：软件自启动PMO键盘无法唤醒的问题
修复：统一接口api偶尔会出现null电量的问题
notesEn: Added: Paishi plugin and VGN 98 PRO V3 recognition
Changed: fixed the issue where recent battery level was not shown after MCHOSE devices slept
Changed: fixes for AULA and Wanlingjingji recognition issues
Fixed: PMO keyboard could not wake after app auto-start
Fixed: the unified API occasionally returned null battery values

notes: 新增：瓦尔基里插件、前行者插件、黑爵插件，瓦尔基里M1 PRO,前行者S9 PRO，黑爵AJ 159 PRO，雷蛇旋风黑鲨V3PRO，迈从G75V2，
修改：调整统一标准数据接口输出
修改：休眠时电量显示为最近一次有效电量
修复：PS5设备多余的问题
notesEn: Added: Valkyrie, Qianxingzhe, and AULA plugins, plus support for Valkyrie M1 PRO, Qianxingzhe S9 PRO, AULA AJ 159 PRO, Razer BlackShark V3 PRO, and MCHOSE G75 V2
Changed: adjusted unified standard data API output
Changed: sleeping devices now show the most recent valid battery level
Fixed: extra PS5 device issue

notes: 新增：罗技G733支持
新增：刷新设备、刷新电量可选间隔
修改：万灵竞记识别问题

notesEn: Added: Logitech G733 support
Added: optional intervals for refreshing devices and battery levels
Changed: fixed Wanlingjingji recognition issues
Changed: fixed the extra HID device issue for Xbox controllers
Changed: fixed extra device recognition issues for ROG
Changed: fixed floating window size adjustment not taking effect

notes: 新增：ROG RX游侠TKL支持

Changed: fixed duplicate ROG and Tuge devices

notes: 新增：万灵竞记插件
修改：当设备休眠或者关机时，不再移除列表中的设备，仅当拔出USB时才移除（本次大更新后，设备的历史设置会重置，辛苦大家重新设置一下，后续基本不会再有这种改动）
notesEn: Added: Wanlingjingji plugin

Changed: devices are no longer removed from the list when they sleep or power off, and will now be removed only when USB is unplugged (after this major update, device history settings will be reset, so please set them again; this kind of change should rarely happen again)

notes: 新增：CHERRY、PMO、图阁插件，ATK Z87 PRO支持
修改：修复雷蛇实时读取问题，建议升级
notesEn: Added: CHERRY, PMO, and Tuge plugins, plus ATK Z87 PRO support

notes: 新增：ninjutso插件，已实测ninjutso sora V3、ninjutso ten air

notesEn: Added: ninjutso plugin; tested with ninjutso sora V3 and ninjutso ten air
Changed: Razer now fully uses real-time queries instead of waiting for device reports

notesEn: Added: ATK X1, MCHOSE G3V2 mouse, Z75S keyboard, and Logitech G PRO X2

Changed: fixed incorrect battery levels for standard Bluetooth devices

notes: 新增：英文支持

notesEn: Added: English support
Added: AirPods Max support
Fixed: entitlement errors after logging in again the next day
Fixed: removed the main-window hide-on-focus-loss behavior

notes: 修复：主窗口按钮被遮挡的问题

Fixed: login window being covered

notes: 新增：主标题公告栏（铃铛图标）
新增：统一标准数据接口api，可生成标准json数据用于第三方插件，具体教程链接在公告中
新增：每个账号支持3台设备同时登录，如果会员权益失效，注销后再登录一遍
修复：尝试修复已购买扩展包用户，插件市场启用状态无法保留的问题
修复：试用用户无法升级永久VIP的问题
修复：部分bug
notesEn: Added: a main title announcement area (bell icon)
Added: a unified standard data API that can generate standard JSON data for third-party plugins; the tutorial link is in the announcement
Added: each account now supports logging in on 3 devices at the same time; if membership entitlement becomes invalid, log out and log back in
Fixed: tried to fix the issue where users who purchased expansion packs could not keep plugin marketplace enable states
Fixed: trial users could not upgrade to permanent VIP
Fixed: various bugs

notes: 重要通知：EasyBluetooth3.0已上线，账号、支付体系全面重构，旧版本微软商店的用户请转至使用官网exe版本，微软商店版本将会主要面向海外用户。（建议使用官网exe版本，更新和修复更快）
新增：插件市场（设置界面中打开）
新增：迈从设备（设备协议有很多不同，不完全支持所有型号，无法识别请联系我）
修复：各种bug
notesEn: Important: EasyBluetooth 3.0 is now live. The account and payment systems have been fully rebuilt. Users of the old Microsoft Store version should switch to the official website EXE version, while the Microsoft Store version will mainly target overseas users. (The official EXE version is recommended because updates and fixes arrive faster.)
Added: plugin marketplace (open it from Settings)
Added: MCHOSE devices (device protocols vary a lot, so not all models are fully supported; contact me if your device cannot be recognized)
Fixed: various bugs

notes: 重要通知：官网版本将作为测试版，微软版本将作为正式稳定版。新功能会在测试版优先进行开放。插件管理页面和统一数据接口即将上线，敬请期待
修复：尝试修复部分用户罗技开机自启动无法识别的问题
修复：托盘悬浮窗设备名字长度限制问题
notesEn: Important: the official website version will serve as the beta build, and the Microsoft version will serve as the stable release. New features will be opened on the beta first. The plugin management page and unified data API are coming soon.
Fixed: tried to fix the issue where some users' Logitech devices were not recognized on startup
Fixed: tray floating window device name length limit

notes: 修复：移除离线状态，回退到休眠状态版本

notesEn: Fixed: full battery now displays as 100

Fixed: AirPods left and right battery levels were reversed

notesEn: Added: support for the ROG Yingmo keyboard and some Razer devices
Added: always-on-top floating window
Added: main window auto-hide to the tray when it loses focus
Fixed: PS5 freeze issue
Fixed: various bugs

notes: 修复：使用新的的方式读取雷蛇电量
修复：取消窗口高度限制
notesEn: Fixed: now uses a new way to read Razer battery levels
Fixed: removed the window height limit

notes: 新增：右键菜单用户须知
修复：雷蛇键鼠无法识别的问题
notesEn: Added: User Notice entry in the right-click menu
Fixed: Razer keyboard and mouse recognition issues

notes: 新增：支持识别akt/vgn
修复：罗技相关的bug

notesEn: Added: support for detecting ATK/VGN
Fixed: Logitech-related bugs
Fixed: battery display issues for ROG keyboards such as FALCHION
Fixed: some window and tray bugs

notes: 优化：完全重构罗技和雷蛇部分，不再依赖G-HUB和雷云（雷蛇部分设备支持可能还有一些问题，仍在紧急修改中）
修复：闪退bug
notesEn: Improved: fully refactored parts of the Logitech and Razer integrations, no longer relying on G HUB and Synapse (some Razer devices may still have issues and are being fixed urgently)
Fixed: crash bug

notes: 新增：ROG的键盘支持，OMNI和非omni接收器的支持
优化：不再依赖G-hub的后台驱动，彻底使用自有方式读取罗技设备
优化：雷蛇读取相关代码
优化：高分辨下的系统托盘高清绘制
notesEn: Added: support for ROG keyboards, OMNI receivers, and non-OMNI receivers
Improved: no longer relies on G Hub background drivers and now uses an in-house method to read Logitech devices
Improved: Razer read-related code
Improved: high-DPI HD rendering for the system tray

notes: 新增：托盘图标“原生风格”
修复：数字风格托盘bug

notes: 新增：自定义设备图标和选择托盘图标风格

notesEn: Added: custom device icons and tray icon style selection
Added: split devices in the floating window
Added: three-part battery display for AirPods left earbud, right earbud, and charging case
Added: choose specific devices to display in the tray
Fixed from feedback: main window sizing issues under different scaling settings
Fixed from feedback: freezing when disabling auto-start

notes: 修改雷蛇设备读取方法

notesEn: Changed: updated the Razer device reading method
Added: right-click rename and hide device functions
Implemented responsive scaling of device information when resizing the window
Added a button to open the log folder

notes: 右键托盘新增反馈问题入口
优化预测续航算法
notesEn: Added a feedback entry to the tray right-click menu
Improved the estimated battery life algorithm

notes: 新增了更多的雷蛇设备支持
尝试修复罗技设备休眠相关的问题
notesEn: Added support for more Razer devices

notes: 修复了历史电量数据采集的问题
notesEn: Fixed historical battery data collection issues

notes: 新增启动最小化
修复部分BUG
notesEn: Added start minimized
Fixed some bugs

notes: 新增罗技和雷蛇的支持
新增语音包的高级功能

notesEn: Added Logitech and Razer support
Added advanced voice pack features
Added battery display when hovering over the tray icon

notes: 修复了无法支付的bug
notesEn: Fixed the issue where payments could not be completed

notes: 修复了悬浮窗打开需要会员的bug
notesEn: Fixed the bug where opening the floating window required membership

notes: 增加了自定义语音包功能。
notesEn: Added the custom voice pack feature.

notes: 增加了自动更新机制。新增电量统计
notesEn: Added an automatic update mechanism and battery statistics

notes: 新增对 BLE 协议鼠标、键盘等外设的支持，设备概览与提醒全面升级。
notesEn: Added support for BLE mice, keyboards, and other peripherals, with a full upgrade to device overview and alerts.

notes: 升级 WinUI 3 框架，新增桌面 Widget 与酷炫主题皮肤。
notesEn: Upgraded the WinUI 3 framework and added desktop widgets and flashy theme skins.

notes: 首个公开版本，支持蓝牙电量监控与低电量提醒
notesEn: First public release with Bluetooth battery monitoring and low-battery alerts
